summary: Excellent audience recording of a great show
review: The sole review praises the tape as a great audience recording capturing an equally great performance. No specific songs or technical problems are mentioned, indicating overall satisfaction with both the music and the recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; it highlights a great audience recording and strong show but provides no detailed breakdown, so rating is high but confidence limited.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the audience recording 'great' with no noted flaws; implies clear and enjoyable sound despite being a crowd source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
